name: Jade Flashwing
description: Jade Flashwing is a green and gold variant of Flashwing, an Earth element Skylander originally appearing in Skylanders: Giants.
biography: Flashwing's origins are a mystery, though her first appearance was quite spectacular. When Bash made a wish on a falling star that he could fly, he watched as a glowing geode fell from the sky and landed in the heart of a valley. Inside that geode was the beautiful but lethal Flashwing. Bash may not have gotten his wings that day, but Flashwing certainly made an impact.
personality: Graceful and elegant, Jade Flashwing possesses a fierce spirit and a sharp wit. While she can be somewhat vain about her beautiful crystalline appearance, she is a formidable warrior who doesn't hesitate to jump into the fray to protect her fellow Skylanders.
trivia: Jade Flashwing is a rare variant representing the gemstone jade.
She shares the same stats and abilities as the standard Flashwing, but features a unique green and gold color scheme.
She was initially released as a store exclusive in certain regions during the Skylanders: Giants era.
gameplay: In combat, Jade Flashwing utilizes her crystal wings and tail to fire sharp shards at enemies from a distance. She can also perform a Shimmering Spin to deflect attacks and strike nearby foes with her wings. Her gameplay focuses on high-speed projectile attacks and area control through her crystal summons.

basic.name: Crystal Shards
basic.content: Shoot crystal shards from your tail at enemies.

basic.name: Shimmering Spin
basic.content: Spin around, hitting enemies with your wings.

basic_upgrades.name: Surrounded by Shards
basic_upgrades.content: Spinning creates a ring of crystals that damage enemies.

soulgems.name: Crystal Lighthouse
soulgems.content: A giant crystal beam shoots from the ground, damaging all nearby enemies.
